data.name: Pocket Hoes
data.detailed_description:
Pocket Hoes is a hilarious “dating” simulator where charm, mayhem and questionable decisions go hand in hand. You play as an adorable (or desperate?) protagonist who suddenly finds himself surrounded by a group of wild, unique and unpredictable girls, each with their own quirks, drama and hilarious personalities.

From the goth girl who only speaks in cryptic poetry, to the clown girl who goes mad with rage in real life, to the tan elf who takes every date as a live broadcast, your goal is simple: win their hearts, ridiculous conversation after ridiculous conversation.

The game combines lighthearted storytelling with quirky scenarios and choice-based dialogue. Grow your relationships and discover each girl's story, and even some strange secrets along the way.

With colorful art, absurd humor, and a host of whores to get along with (or scare away), Pocket Hoes is perfect for players looking for fun, flirty mayhem with a hint of heart.

Will you be able to make it through awkward dates, bizarre challenges and romantic disasters?

data.short_description: Are you looking for a game with a great narrative, unique gameplay and amazing graphics? Then you're in the wrong place. But we have gothic boobs, dark elfs, clussy and ice cream.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: intel celeron n4020
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 750
  • DirectX: 版本：7.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: none
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: intel i3 N305
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GTX 750
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: none
